user.title: Wiener Netze Smart Meter
user.description: Choose how to authenticate with the Wiener Netze portal.

credentials.title: Credentials & Meter Details
credentials.description: Enter your credentials and smart meter details. For cookie auth, get the KEYCLOAK_IDENTITY cookie from the Wiener Netze Smart Meter portal using browser developer tools.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Wiener Netze API.
